article.title: Giving Referral At Uber
article.content:
Hello all,
Uber has been on a hiring spree in past few months. I am looking to refer to a few candidates. If interested, fill out the google form:

https://forms.gle/EdgZKJA7bKtQYU7g7

post.content:
Hi! If you're looking to give referrals, I built a website to connect candidates with referrers.

You may post it on here: 👉 https://app.referralhelp.net

Candidates will upload their resumes for review before getting referred 🙂
Dude, the OA for uber is soo tough !! :(
Hey , I am in second year of BTech i want a good opportunity of an internship \nMy DSA is good and i am a C++programmer
Are there any opening for SDE-1?

Hey, \nI\u2019m a Software Engineer with startup working experience in building scalable backend and full-stack systems using Django, Go, and Vue.js. I enjoy solving algorithmic problems, working on high-impact products, and I\u2019m currently interested in SDE-1 and SDE-2 opportunities.

Hello, I am Data science graduate and a fresher seeking an opportunity to start my career and grow with uber. while in my professional journey, I\'m quick to learn, and confident in my ability to add value in this role. I\'m interested in this opportunity please do consider my application
